popularStory.headline: My Maternal 24th. Great Grandmother, Ragnhilda Olafsdotter, Princess of Man
popularStory.description:
Name: Ragnhilda Olafsdotter, Princess of Man, daughter of Olaf Bitling, King of Man  
Ragnhilda Ragnhildis Sabina Effrica OLAFSDATTIR (Queen of Innesgall, Princess of Isle of Man)
Also Known As: Princ …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir於1117年出生在曼島時，她的父親King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red37歲，母親Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney20歲。她於大約1140年與Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles在曼島結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1200年在她的家鄉享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir于1117年出生在曼岛时，她的父亲King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red37岁，母亲Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney20岁。她于大约1140年与Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles在曼岛结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1200年在她的家乡享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ragnhilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + hildr ‘battle’.

variants.name: Ragnild
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + hildr ‘battle’.

en.lifeSummary: When Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir was born in 1117, in Isle of Man, her father, King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red, was 37 and her mother, Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney, was 20. She married Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles about 1140, in Isle of Man. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1200, in her hometown, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir est née en 1117, à Île de Man, son père, King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles environ 1140, à Île de Man. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1200, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir 1117 in Isle of Man geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red 37 und ihre Mutter Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney 20. Sie hat um 1140 in Isle of Man Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1200 im Alter von 83 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir è nata il nel 1117 nel Isola di Man, sua padre, King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles circa 1140, nel Isola di Man. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1200, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottirが1117年にマン島で生まれた時，父King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Redは37歳，母Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkneyは20歳であった。約1140年にマン島でSomerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Islesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1200年に故郷で83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir(이)가 1117년 맨섬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1140년 맨섬에서 Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1200년 그녀의 고향에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir nasceu em 1117, em Ilha de Man, seu pai, King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles aproximadamente 1140, em Ilha de Man. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1200, em sua cidade natal, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir родилась в 1117 г. в местности Остров Мэн, её отцу по имени King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles около 1140 г. в местности Остров Мэн. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1200 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir nació en 1117, en Isla de Man, su papá, King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles aproximadamente 1140, en Isla de Man. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1200, en su pueblo, a la edad de 83 años.
